start.welcome_dm:
Welcome, {name} Trainer!
Welcome to the Pokemon Bot!

Use the buttons below for quick navigation!
Check your status with 'Status'.

Help — View all commands
start.welcome_group:
Pokemon Bot is now active!
Type 'c' to catch wild Pokemon!
The first Pokemon will appear soon!

Set the bot as admin for auto-cleanup of messages!

spawn.wild_appeared:
A wild {emoji} {name} appeared!
Type 'c' to catch! (60s)

catch.no_pokeballs: No Pokeballs left! Recharge or wait until tomorrow.
catch.no_hyperball: You don't have any Great Balls!
catch.no_masterball: You don't have any Master Balls!

battle.challenge_accepted: Battle accepted! Let the fight begin!
battle.no_team: You need to register a battle team first!
battle.already_pending: A battle challenge is already pending.
battle.already_processed: This battle challenge has already been processed.
battle.participants_only: Only battle participants can use this!
battle.winner_only: Only the winner can use this!
battle.detail_dm_fail: DM failed! Please /start the bot first.
battle.challenge_msg:
{challenger} challenged {defender} to a battle!
Accept within {timeout}s!
battle.challenge_reply_hint: To challenge someone, reply to their message with 'battle'!
battle.no_team_hint:
No battle team!
Register a team with 'Team Register' in DM.
battle.team_incomplete:
Team has only {count} Pokemon! Need {required} to battle.
Complete your team with 'Team Edit' in DM.
battle.team_cost_over:
Team cost exceeded! ({cost}/{limit})
Adjust cost with 'Team Edit' in DM.
battle.defender_no_team:
Defender has no battle team!
Register a team with 'Team Register' in DM.
battle.defender_incomplete: Defender's team has only {count}! Need {required} to battle.
battle.defender_cost_over:
Defender's team cost exceeded! ({cost}/{limit})
Please reorganize the team.
battle.challenger_incomplete: Challenger's team has only {count}! Cannot battle.
battle.challenger_cost_over:
Challenger's team cost exceeded! ({cost}/{limit})
Cannot battle.
battle.accept_text_hint: Please use the ✅ Accept button above!
battle.decline_text_hint: Please use the ❌ Decline button above!
battle.ranked_hint: Type 'ranked' or tap button for Ranked Battle!
battle.tier_note_base: Based on base stats + max friendship
battle.tier_note_matchup: Type matchups can turn the tide

team.title: Battle Team
team.cost_exceeded: Team cost exceeds the limit of {max}!
team.team_empty: Your team is empty. Register Pokemon first!
team.select_pokemon: Select a Pokemon to add to your team.
team.stats_line: HP {hp} / ATK {atk} / DEF {def} / SpA {spa} / SpD {spd} / SPD {spd_stat}
team.slot_place_hint: Tap a slot to place/replace Pokemon.
team.cost_over_warning: ⚠️ Cost exceeded! ({cost}/{limit}) Cannot enter Ranked/Tournament. 💡 Edit your team with 'Team Edit'! 📋 Cost by rarity: ⬜Common 1 / 🟦Rare 2 / 🟪Epic 4 🟨Legend 5 / 🟧Ultra Leg. 6
team.team_use_hint: Use 'Team Select {num}' to set this team for battles.
team.team_empty_msg: Team {num} is empty. Register with 'Team Register {num}' first.
team.team_swapped:
Team 1 ↔ Team 2 swapped!
Active team: Team {active}
team.session_expired: Edit session expired. Start again with 'Team Edit'.
team.team_size_short:
Team must have exactly {required} Pokemon!
Currently only {current} registered.
Fill empty slots with 'Team Edit'.
team.ultra_max_msg:
Max {max} Ultra Legendary per team.
Try again with 'Team Edit'.

partner.title: My Partner
partner.select: Tap a Pokemon to set as partner!
partner.battle_bonus: Your partner gets +5% ATK in battle!
partner.bonus_info: Partner in team gives ATK +{pct}% in battle!
partner.no_partner: No partner set. Choose one from your Pokemon!

ranked.title: Ranked Battle
ranked.no_match: No opponent found. Try again later.
ranked.cannot_self: You can't challenge yourself to ranked!
ranked.cannot_bot: You can't challenge a bot to ranked!
ranked.arena_only:
Ranked battles are only available in Arenas!
Check arena list with 'Season' command.
ranked.reply_hint: To start a ranked battle, reply to opponent's message with 'ranked'!
ranked.no_season: No active season. Please try again later.
ranked.team_rule_fail:
Team does not meet ranked requirements.
{error}
ranked.defender_no_team:
Defender has no battle team!
Register with 'Team Register' in DM.
ranked.pair_decay_zero: 🚫 Same opponent daily limit — RP not applied
ranked.no_team_hint:
No battle team!
Register with 'Team Register' first.
ranked.cost_over_msg:
Team cost exceeded! ({cost}/{limit})
Edit with 'Team Edit'.

📋 Cost by rarity:
  ⬜Common 1 / 🟦Rare 2 / 🟪Epic 4
  🟨Legend 5 / 🟧Ultra Leg. 6
  Total must be {limit} or less
ranked.match_fail:
Could not find a matching opponent.
Please try again later!
ranked.opp_team_fail:
Opponent's team does not meet requirements.
Please try again later!
ranked.opp_cost_fail:
Opponent's team exceeds cost limit.
Please try again later!
ranked.placement_needed: Complete 5 placements to get your tier!
ranked.no_season_record:
No ranked records this season.
Type 'ranked' in DM to start!
ranked.arena_registered:
'{name}' registered as arena candidate!
Included in weekly arena selection.
ranked.pair_decay_zero_short: Same opponent limit — RP not applied

pokedex.title: {name}'s Pokedex ({count})
pokedex.evolve_not_ready: Friendship must be MAX to evolve.
pokedex.future_gen: This Pokemon is from Gen 4+. Only up to Gen 3 is available.

dungeon.title: Pokemon Dungeon
dungeon.already_active: ⚠️ You already have an active dungeon run!
dungeon.pokemon_error: ⚠️ Could not load Pokemon data. Dungeon ended. Ticket refunded.

item.item_guide_iv_reroll_all: IV Reroll: Go to DM > 'Items' > Select Pokemon > Reroll all 6 IVs!
item.item_guide_iv_reroll_one: IV Select Reroll: Go to DM > 'Items' > Select Pokemon > Pick 1 stat to reroll!
item.item_guide_shiny_egg: Shiny Egg: Auto-hatches after 24h into a guaranteed Shiny! Check via 'Items' in DM.
item.item_guide_shiny_spawn: Shiny Spawn Ticket: Type 'force spawn' or 'shiny spawn' in chat for a guaranteed Shiny!

market.title: Market
market.buy_fail_own: You can't buy your own listing!

trade.title: Trade
trade.usage:
Usage: trade @username [Pokemon name]
Example: trade @John Pikachu
trade.usage_duplicate:
If you have duplicates:
trade @John Pikachu #2 (select 2nd)
trade.not_found_user:
@{username} Trainer not found.
They need to /start the bot first.

fusion.title: Pokemon Fusion
fusion.description:
Fuse 2 of the same Pokemon to create
1 Pokemon with new IVs!
fusion.no_fusable: No fusable Pokemon in this rarity.
fusion.success: Fusion complete! A new {name} was born!
fusion.shiny_bonus: Shiny x Shiny = Guaranteed A-grade IV!

release.title: Release Pokemon
release.description: Release a Pokemon back into the wild.
release.select_hint: Select at least 1 rarity or IV grade
release.filter_reset: Filters were reset. Please try again.

shop.title: BP Shop
shop.forcespawn_item: Force Spawn Ticket x1 — {price} (Owned: {count}, resets 50 spawns)
shop.hyperball_item: Great Ball x3 — {price} BP (Owned: {count}, 3x catch rate)
shop.arcade_item: Arcade Ticket x1 — {price} BP (Owned: {count}, 1hr arcade mode)
shop.buy_masterball_limit:
Master Ball daily limit ({limit}) reached.
Try again tomorrow!
shop.buy_usage: Usage: buy masterball / buy forcespawn / buy pokeball
shop.popup_forcespawn_ok: ⚡ Spawn Ticket bought! Use in chat (BP left: {bp})

gacha.title: Gacha
hint_normal:
The orb glows gently...

Checking the result...

Pikachu tilts its head curiously...

Peering into the orb of fate...

A faint light swirls inside the orb...

Checking the result...
hint_jackpot:
The orb is blazing with light...!!

Something extraordinary is happening...

Pikachu's eyes are wide open...!!

Something extraordinary is happening...

A mysterious presence behind you...?!

Something extraordinary is happening...

premium.dungeon_hint: Subscribe for more dungeon tickets! DM: 'premium'

tournament.min_players: Need at least {min} players to start.

error.maintenance: Under maintenance. Please try again later.

error.market_listed: This Pokemon is listed on the market.

lucky/unlucky trainers, trade kings, night owls and more!

tutorial_dm.first_catch_intro:
You just tried your first catch!
This bot has many more features:

tutorial_dm.will_guide: Let me show you one by one!

Catch Pokemon and stay active to unlock titles.
